target_market_label.zh: 土库曼斯坦（Turkmenstandartlary / 国家电力）
target_market_label.zht: 土庫曼斯坦（Turkmenstandartlary / 國家電力）

title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入土库曼斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入土庫曼斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Turkmenistan Turkmenstandartlary conformity requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards applicable to BESS project specifications, Turkmenenergo grid-connection requirements for 220/380 V 50 Hz state-controlled grid, fire-safety installation expectations aligned with IEC 63056 and NFPA 855 direction, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements — versus China GB/T 36276, GB 38031, GB/T 34131, and GB/T 36558 baselines. Note: Turkmenistan is not a member of the EAEU and EAC/TR CU certification does not apply; the domestic Turkmenstandartlary conformity route governs.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与土库曼斯坦Turkmenstandartlary合格评定要求、适用于BESS项目规格的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、Turkmenenergo 220/380 V 50 Hz国家管控电网并网要求、符合IEC 63056和NFPA 855方向的消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3及IEC 62281运输要求——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB 38031、GB/T 34131及GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。注意：土库曼斯坦并非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，EAC/TR CU认证不适用；国内Turkmenstandartlary合格评定路径为适用途径。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與土庫曼斯坦Turkmenstandartlary合格評定要求、適用於BESS項目規格的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、Turkmenenergo 220/380 V 50 Hz國家管控電網併網要求、符合IEC 63056和NFPA 855方向的消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3及IEC 62281運輸要求——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB 38031、GB/T 34131及GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。注意：土庫曼斯坦並非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，EAC/TR CU認證不適用；國內Turkmenstandartlary合格評定路徑為適用途徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Turkmenstandartlary conformity scope determination, Turkmenenergo grid-connection approval, fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Turkmenistan Turkmenstandartlary technical regulations, Turkmenenergo grid-connection technical specifications, applicable fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Turkmenistan is not a member of the EAEU — EAC/TR CU certification confers no automatic market-access rights in Turkmenistan; the domestic Turkmenstandartlary conformity route applies.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、Turkmenstandartlary合格评定范围裁定、Turkmenenergo并网批准、消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行土库曼斯坦Turkmenstandartlary技术法规、Turkmenenergo并网技术规格、适用消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。土库曼斯坦并非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员——EAC/TR CU认证在土库曼斯坦不赋予任何自动市场准入权利；国内Turkmenstandartlary合格评定路径适用。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、Turkmenstandartlary合格評定範圍裁定、Turkmenenergo併網批准、消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行土庫曼斯坦Turkmenstandartlary技術法規、Turkmenenergo併網技術規格、適用消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。土庫曼斯坦並非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員——EAC/TR CU認證在土庫曼斯坦不賦予任何自動市場准入權利；國內Turkmenstandartlary合格評定路徑適用。

answer_first.en: Turkmenistan does not have a published standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or a dedicated IEC 62619 certification route. The country's standards body, Turkmenstandartlary (Main State Service for Standardisation, Metrology and State Supervision), oversees conformity assessment; however, Turkmenistan is NOT a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU), so EAC / TR CU certification does not apply and should not be assumed to confer market access. Grid-scale BESS in Turkmenistan falls under Turkmenenergo (the state electricity monopoly) procurement and project specifications, which are expected to reference IEC international standards as technical prerequisites. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Turkmenistan are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for project acceptance; (2) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in Turkmenenergo or project-owner specifications; (3) thermal derating documentation — Turkmenistan's extreme desert climate (ambient temperatures routinely above 45 °C) makes battery thermal management and derating evidence a critical project deliverable; (4) fire-safety installation documentation aligned with IEC 63056 / NFPA 855 direction, as Chinese GB fire standards are not internationally recognised; (5) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions; and (6) grid compatibility confirmation for Turkmenenergo's 220/380 V 50 Hz state grid — voltage is nominally compatible with China's grid, but PCS settings and protection parameters must be validated for Turkmenenergo's specific grid conditions. Chinese GB/T 36276, GB 38031, GB/T 34131, and GB/T 36558 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in Turkmenenergo project or authority review.
answer_first.zh: 土库曼斯坦尚无公开的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》或专用IEC 62619认证路径相当。该国标准机构Turkmenstandartlary（国家标准化、计量和国家监督主管服务机构）负责监督合格评定；然而，土库曼斯坦并非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，因此EAC/TR CU认证不适用，不应假定其赋予市场准入。土库曼斯坦电网规模BESS属于Turkmenenergo（国家电力垄断企业）采购和项目规格范畴，预计将以IEC国际标准作为技术前提。中国BESS出口土库曼斯坦的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为项目验收的国际预期基准；（2）Turkmenenergo或项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（3）热降额文件——土库曼斯坦极端沙漠气候（环境温度通常超过45°C）使电池热管理和降额证据成为关键项目交付物；（4）符合IEC 63056/NFPA 855方向的消防安全安装文件，中国GB消防标准未获国际认可；（5）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件；（6）Turkmenenergo 220/380 V 50 Hz国家电网兼容性确认——电压名义上与中国电网兼容，但储能变流器参数和保护设定值须针对Turkmenenergo具体电网条件验证。中国GB/T 36276、GB 38031、GB/T 34131及GB/T 36558是生产基准，但在Turkmenenergo项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 土庫曼斯坦尚無公開的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》或專用IEC 62619認證路徑相當。該國標準機構Turkmenstandartlary（國家標準化、計量和國家監督主管服務機構）負責監督合格評定；然而，土庫曼斯坦並非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，因此EAC/TR CU認證不適用，不應假定其賦予市場准入。土庫曼斯坦電網規模BESS屬於Turkmenenergo（國家電力壟斷企業）採購和項目規格範疇，預計將以IEC國際標準作為技術前提。中國BESS出口土庫曼斯坦的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為項目驗收的國際預期基準；（2）Turkmenenergo或項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（3）熱降額文件——土庫曼斯坦極端沙漠氣候（環境溫度通常超過45°C）使電池熱管理和降額證據成為關鍵項目交付物；（4）符合IEC 63056/NFPA 855方向的消防安全安裝文件，中國GB消防標準未獲國際認可；（5）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件；（6）Turkmenenergo 220/380 V 50 Hz國家電網兼容性確認——電壓名義上與中國電網兼容，但儲能變流器參數和保護設定值須針對Turkmenenergo具體電網條件驗證。中國GB/T 36276、GB 38031、GB/T 34131及GB/T 36558是製造基準，但在Turkmenenergo項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
